Hero.name: Tobias Ludwig
Hero.valueProposition: I translate technology into requirements — 10+ years in IT, now with an analytical focus.

llm.label: LLM-optimized
llm.desc: Plain text for AI parsing and analysis

Career.heading: My Path to Business Analyst
Career.intro: My professional path leads from technician to analyst — not a career change, but an arrival. In every role, I brought analytical thinking, coordination, and a big-picture perspective.

telekom.body: Fiber optic installation and network expansion — structured fault analysis and quality assurance as analytical foundation.
telekom.narrative: This is where I learned to systematically analyze complex technical systems — the basis for any requirements analysis.
telekom.technologies: FTTH, Fiber Optics, Splicing, Measurement Technology
details: Fiber optic installation and network expansion

mediacom.body: Coaxial network maintenance and signal analysis — data-driven fault diagnosis using MER and BER metrics.
mediacom.narrative: Signal analysis with concrete metrics was my first contact with data-driven decision making.
mediacom.technologies: Coaxial Networks, MER, BER, Signal Analysis

biermann.body: Planning and organizing civil engineering works, leading technician teams — project management and coordination in practice.
biermann.narrative: Team leadership, planning, and coordination of external partners — classic project management skills every business analyst needs.
biermann.technologies: Copper Network, Civil Engineering, Project Planning
details: Planning and organizing civil engineering works

bwi.body: IT infrastructure projects for the German Ministry of Defence — working with security-critical SINA systems and structured ticketing.
bwi.narrative: Security-critical systems, SINA experience, and structured processes — directly relevant to IAM at Bitmarck.
bwi.technologies: Cisco, LANCOM, VLAN, SINA, IBM Maximo
details: IT infrastructure projects for Ministry of Defence
System installation and configuration (Cisco, LANCOM, VLAN)

persona.body: IT project coordination and process optimization — leading small IT projects and coordinating external service providers.
persona.narrative: Short-term assignment focused on coordination and process optimization — analytical work under time pressure.

bhf.body: Developed CRM and training software — from concept through database design to productive operations.
bhf.narrative: First time owning the entire software development cycle — requirements analysis, architecture, implementation. The turning point toward analyst.
bhf.technologies: Node.js, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, UI/UX Design
details: Development of CRM and training software
Backend with Node.js and REST APIs

xecuro.role: IT System Administrator Secure Client Manager
xecuro.body: Administering and advancing SINA-based secure clients — contributing to security concepts.
xecuro.narrative: Deepening SINA expertise, actively shaping security concepts — the technical bridge to the IAM world.
xecuro.technologies: SINA, Windows, Linux, Hardening, Security Concepts
details: Administration and advancement of SINA-based secure clients
Hardening Windows and Linux systems under security policies
Collaboration with security and infrastructure teams

bitmarck.body: The logical consequence: Analytical thinking and technical understanding as an official role — shaping digital identities in healthcare.
bitmarck.narrative: All threads come together here — technology, analysis, security, coordination.

location.question: Location
location.answer: Flexible — remote and on-site both work. I'm mobile and currently based in the Cologne/Bonn area.

whyBitmarck.question: Why Bitmarck?
whyBitmarck.answer: Bitmarck digitizes healthcare — a domain with real impact. The Business Analyst IAM role connects my technical experience with analytical work on digital identities. Exactly what I'm looking for.

whyBA.question: Why Business Analyst?
whyBA.answer: Analytical thinking has been present in every one of my roles — from infrastructure planning to API architecture. Business Analyst makes this strength an official role.

Footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, TypeScript, next-intl · Self-hosted with Docker

Terminal.unknown: Command not found: {cmd}. Type 'help' for a list of commands.

authApi.title: Auth API Service
authApi.description: JWT-based authentication service with RBAC and Prisma — directly relevant to IAM.
authApi.problem: Multiple applications needed unified authentication and authorization with fine-grained access control.
authApi.approach: Node.js auth service with JWT token flow, role-based access control (RBAC), PostgreSQL, and Prisma ORM.
authApi.result: Production-ready auth service serving multiple apps. Use cases, data models, and access concepts independently developed.

nextCms.title: Next CMS
nextCms.description: Custom headless CMS with Next.js and Supabase — from requirements analysis to operations.
nextCms.problem: Clients needed flexible content management without the complexity of established CMS systems.
nextCms.approach: Headless architecture with Next.js frontend, Supabase backend (Auth, DB, Storage), row-level security (RLS), auto-install script, and Docker self-hosting.
nextCms.result: Fully functional CMS in production use. Client requirements analyzed, architecture designed, independently implemented.

myfitcoach.title: MyFitCoach PRO
myfitcoach.description: Coaching platform with Flutter, Next.js, and Strapi — analytics and realtime features.
myfitcoach.problem: Coaches needed a digital platform for training planning, client management, and progress tracking.
myfitcoach.approach: Fullstack platform with Flutter mobile app, Next.js web dashboard, Strapi backend, realtime features, and integrated analytics.
myfitcoach.result: Functional coaching platform with mobile and web interfaces. Requirements analysis, multi-platform architecture, and analytics independently implemented.

partnerApp.title: Partner App
partnerApp.description: Flutter app for couples with realtime chat, media sharing, and push notifications.
partnerApp.problem: Couples needed a private, secure platform for shared communication and media exchange.
partnerApp.approach: Flutter mobile app with Supabase backend, realtime chat, media sharing, and push notifications via FCM/APNs.
partnerApp.result: Working mobile app with realtime features. Architecture and realtime patterns independently designed and implemented.

logbuchApp.title: Logbuch App
logbuchApp.description: Structured data capture with Flutter and Supabase — form logic and API integration.
logbuchApp.problem: Structured field data capture required a mobile solution with flexible form logic.
logbuchApp.approach: Flutter app with Supabase backend, dynamic form logic, and API integration for data export.
logbuchApp.result: Mobile data capture app with flexible forms. Requirements analyzed and data model independently designed.

mpaNutrition.title: MPA Nutrition Shop
mpaNutrition.description: Custom shop system with payment and shipping integration — e-commerce from scratch.
mpaNutrition.problem: A nutrition shop needed a custom e-commerce solution without dependency on third-party platforms.
mpaNutrition.approach: Custom shop system with payment integration, shipping logic, marketing tools, and analytics.
mpaNutrition.result: Functional online shop with complete order flow. Business requirements analyzed and technically implemented.
